name: Tormod Round Dining Table Brown - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your dining space with the Tormod Round Dining Table from Threshold™. This brown dining table features a round tabletop and a hexagonal base with allover caned design for an attractive look. Designed with a wooden frame, this round dining table complements your existing decor well — simply add coordinating chairs and dine in elegance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
